name: IT TECH PACKAGING, INC.
business: The company produces and distributes corrugating medium paper, offset printing paper, tissue paper products, and medical face masks in China. Corrugating medium paper comprised approximately 100% of total paper production and 99.82% of total revenue in 2024. Offset printing paper, tissue paper, and face mask production were suspended during 2024.

exposures.sentence: Corrugating medium paper, or CMP is used in the manufacturing of cardboard.

We process base tissue paper purchased from long-term cooperative third party and produce finished tissue paper products, including toilet paper, boxed and soft-packed tissues, handkerchief tissues and paper napkins, as well as bathroom and kitchen paper towels that are marketed and sold under the Dongfang Paper brand.
In May 2021, the Company obtained the license for its new single-use surgical masks from local food and drug administration in Hebei province, and began commercial production in November 2021.

tamClaims.claim: China paper and paper board output was 129.65 million tonnes in 2023, up 4.35% from 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2023 China Paper Industry Annual Report, issued by the China Paper Association, there were approximately 2,500 paper and paper board manufacturers in China, with a total output of 129.65 million tonnes, up by 4.35% from 124.25 million tonnes in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: China paper and paper board consumption was 131.65 million tonnes in 2023, up 6.14% from 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: Total domestic consumption was 131.65 million tonnes in 2023, up by 6.14% from 124.03 million tonnes in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Corrugating medium paper production in China was 29.15 million tonnes in 2023, up 5.23% from 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: Corrugating medium paper production in China totaled 29.15 million tonnes in 2023, a 5.23% increase from 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Corrugating medium paper consumption in China was 32.72 million tonnes in 2023, up 8.70% from 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: Consumption of corrugating medium paper in China amounted to 32.72 million tonnes in 2023, an increase of 8.70% as compared to 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Uncoated offset printing paper production in China was 18.05 million tonnes in 2023, up 4.03% from 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: Uncoated offset printing paper production in China totaled 18.05 million tonnes in 2023, a 4.03% increase from 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Uncoated offset printing paper consumption in China was 17.11 million tonnes in 2023, up 1.97% from 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: Consumption of uncoated offset printing paper in China amounted to 17.11 million tonnes in 2023, an increase of 1.97% as compared to 2022.
